pi_items.source: setup_moodle.sh line 323 creates course with shortname='BIO101'; setup_task.sh and export_result.sh query for this course by shortname
export_result.sh line 83 searches for activities matching pattern '%required reading%cell biology%' which matches the metadata value exactly
export_result.sh line 86 searches for activities matching pattern '%lab safety guidelines%' which matches the metadata value exactly

Moodle official documentation (docs.moodle.org/501/en/Activity_completion_settings): completion field values are 0=No tracking, 1=Manual, 2=Automatic. Verifier.py line 73 confirms 'completion=2 means AUTOMATIC'

Moodle official documentation (docs.moodle.org/501/en/Activity_completion_settings): completionview field values are 0=View not required, 1=View required. Verifier.py line 80-82 checks for completionview==1 to verify view requirement is set

privileged_info_summary: The task configures completion tracking in a Moodle course named BIO101 (Introduction to Biology), created as part of the environment setup. Two Page activities are required: 'Required Reading: Cell Biology' and 'Lab Safety Guidelines'. Both must have automatic completion enabled (completion_type=2) with a view requirement (completion_view=1), and both must be configured as course completion criteria. All data is synthetically generated by the environment setup scripts.
